311 I5500_BRN_INJURY_CD I5500_BRN_INJURY_CD I5500 Active Diagnoses: Traumatic Brain Injury (TBI) Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident had an active diagnosis of a traumatic brain injury (TBI) in the last seven days. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
